steps.title: Use a fast setup
steps.content: Substitute the two given points into the function. At $x=c$, $$ac-b=8.$$ At $x=2c$, $$2ac-b=126.$$

steps.title: Eliminate $b$
steps.content: Subtract the first equation from the second: $$(2ac-b)-(ac-b)=126-8,$$ so $$ac=118.$$

steps.title: Confirm by algebra
steps.content: Substitute $ac=118$ into $ac-b=8$: $$118-b=8.$$ Therefore $$b=110.$$ That matches the correct answer, C.
